ALIOUAT née ZOUAOUI Zibouda
ALIOUAT née ZOUAOUI Zibouda
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur
Email:zaliouat@univ-setif.dz

Département:Informatique
Bureau:20
Bureau:20

Zibouda Aliouat
obtained
her engineer diploma in 1984 and MSc in 1993 from Constantine University. She
received her PhD from Setif 1 University of Algeria. She was an assistant
professor at Constantine University from 1985 to 1994. Currently she is
professor in Computer Engineering Department at Setif 1 University of Algeria.
Her research interests are in the areas of computer networks and communication
modeling and simulation, wireless sensor networks (WSN), fault tolerance of
embedded systems and security and privacy in the Internet of Things (IoT), Internet of vehicles (IoV),
Nanonetworks communication. Specifically, it focused on clustering routing
protocols in wireless communication and MAC layer.
